caption:
New Jellycat Airlines store now open at Harrods, London Heathrow, Terminal 5 ✨ @jellycat

Jellycat and Harrods have just opened the perfect spot to pick up gifts while travelling. I loved the cute design and the variety of Jellies 🧸 (featuring festive characters, the Valentine’s Day collection, bag charms, bags, and more!) A must-visit! ✈️✨

📍 Harrods, London Heathrow, Terminal 5 @jellyfriends
